subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God! Through His grace thou hast attained, and unto the horizon of His Cause thou hast turned thyself. God willing, in all conditions [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله بعنایت حق فائز شدی و بافق امر توجه نمودی انشاء الله در جمیع احوال
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @wisdom [hikmat]
